First bot getting all dat attention 🤑🙏 Anyways I fixed the introduction, just thought that it was too bland and boring, plus i have nothing else to do anyways, leave suggestions in the comments i guess Tags (Ignore) Kim Pine, Anime, Musician, Game, Ramona Flowers, Scott Pilgrim, Drummer

Okay so, Janitor has a new policy in which NSFW pictures aren't allowed, in which the pics I used for 3 bots got removed, and now I gotta improvise, I'm keeping the introduction the same considering the fact that the new image is doing something different, but its whatever
